description_long: This stuffed toy features a cartoonish humanoid character with a large, pale face, a round blue nose, and a wide, open-mouthed smile showing a red tongue. The eyes are large and expressive, with black eyebrows and blue cheeks, giving the toy a playful and mischievous appearance. It wears a black beanie hat and a black outfit with a red inverted cross on the chest, adding a distinctive and edgy touch. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands and feet are simple and rounded. The back of the head is plain and unadorned, with the black hat covering the top. The overall design is soft and plush, with smooth, matte surfaces and minimal detailing on the limbs.
description: A cartoonish humanoid stuffed toy with a large pale face, blue nose, black beanie, and black outfit featuring a red inverted cross. The toy has a playful expression and outstretched arms.
description_view_0: Front view shows the character's expressive face, blue nose, open mouth, black beanie, and red inverted cross on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, protruding nose, and the rounded shape of the hat and body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the plain back of the head and body, with the black beanie and outfit visible but no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, nose, and the simple shape of the limbs.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon humanoid with a black beanie and blue nose
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and cheerful, with wide eyes, raised eyebrows, and a big open-mouthed smile showing a red tongue.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: black outfit with red inverted cross
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched horizontally and legs slightly apart.
